title: corybas calcicola
intro: Corybas calcicola, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Western Australia. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming Corybas calcicola is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
